records.m_Talk_ENG: Richard Werner...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This case is frighteningly strange.

records.m_Talk_FRA: This case is frighteningly strange.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The scene was closed off... and there wasn't even a single drop of blood from the headless corpse.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The scene was closed off... and there wasn't even a single drop of blood from the headless corpse.

records.m_Talk_FRA: And this writing...

records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Pass the fourth ordeal, and she will become iron heated in flame.</color>

records.m_Talk_FRA: What does it even mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We found it, ma'am!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We found it, ma'am!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We found it, ma'am!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The prime suspect! We found the prime suspect!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The prime suspect! We found the prime suspect!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The prime suspect! We found the prime suspect!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Where?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Where?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Where?

records.m_Talk_ENG: From the drama series!
records.m_Talk_DEU: From the drama series!
records.m_Talk_FRA: From the drama series!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It just aired its last episode and the meaning of the writing was revealed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It just aired its last episode and the meaning of the writing was revealed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It just aired its last episode and the meaning of the writing was revealed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's without a doubt! Our prime suspect is Swan!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's without a doubt! Our prime suspect is Swan!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's without a doubt! Our prime suspect is Swan!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan Claire, Charade's movie actress and scriptwriter, is behind all of this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan Claire, Charade's movie actress and scriptwriter, is behind all of this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan Claire, Charade's movie actress and scriptwriter, is behind all of this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Drama series?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Drama series?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Drama series?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you kidding me? What kind of nonsense is that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you kidding me? What kind of nonsense is that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you kidding me? What kind of nonsense is that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I sense the stench... that should not exist.

records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It was nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It was nothing.

records.m_Talk_FRA: A wild animal was trying to come in... so I <color=#ff3636>handled it.</color>

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's likely from a Corrupted area. Dispose of it as soon as possible.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The <color=#ffd34c>special possibilities</color>.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, fearful citizens will try to find someone to blame it on.
